summary: openTPStore opens SQLite with journal_mode(WAL) + busy_timeout(5000) + foreign_keys(1) DSN pragmas, matching store.OpenWithContext defaults.
reason: Greptile P1 on PR #588: bare sql.Open with no pragmas means concurrent CLI invocations get immediate SQLITE_BUSY instead of waiting on writer locks.
validated_outcome: go build ./... and go vet ./... pass.
